text:
TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 

VALUES: 01 = State appropriations to the Medicaid agency 
02 = Intergovernmental transfers (IGT) 
03 = Certified public expenditures (CPE) 
04 = Provider taxes 
05 = Donations 
06 = State appropriations to the Children’s Health Insurance Program (CHIP) agency 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: —
